violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door freezer. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
The wall below the three bay sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2025

2-door reach-in is not in good repair. Temperatures fluctuate above 41 degrees F. No TCS foods observed in this unit. Work order has been placed. Equipment must remain in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The wall under the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. A section of wall and coving is missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Wall and coving are to be properly repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must register a Food Safety Manager with the RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Sink and Surface sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024
Hot water was not available at the 3 bay sink. Hot water must be available at three bay. System must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. 3-bay sink is to be used for sanitizing until dishwasher is serviced and reaching rinse temperature of 180 degrees F (surface temperature of 160 degrees F). New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC has ServSafe 24185968. Inspector spoke with PIC supervisor Food Safety Manager Application was mailed to RIDOH on 9/28/23. Establishment does reheat/cook and hot hold food for a highly susceptible population. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets on Main Milk Chest and Milk Chest #2 were observed in poor repair. Gaskets need to be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
